reason: Frontend layer spec for composer popover + new helper additions.
§3 contract — buildProjectRoleTagOptions is the canonical roleTag aggregator; hideEmployeeUi extends to the popover when project is wise_trellis.
Discriminated union extension on SlashOption with the new roleTag variant; explicit return types.
Composer popover renders within Semi-UI AIChatInput; keep prop pipeline minimal and avoid coupling to internal Tiptap state.
AppImpl → composer surface → SlashPopover → option-builder; verify single data direction.
Reuse insertPlainAt / ensureSpaceAfterAtInsert and getRoleTags — do not invent new insertion or tag-aggregation helpers.
